posts.text: Just shipped a Laravel + Vue CRM with real-time dashboards and Stripe billing. Performance tuning cut load time by 40%. Happy to help if you are planning a similar build.
Figma to production in 3 weeks: React frontend, Node API, PostgreSQL. Clean architecture + reusable components = faster iterations for the client team.
Integrated ChatGPT + document pipelines for a compliance platform. Lesson learned: always validate prompts and log API usage from day one.
